home.subtitle: 300+ signal matrix tracking in real-time. AI-powered deep analysis of market sentiment, fund flows, and on-chain data to support your trading decisions
home.featureSubtitle: End-to-end AI empowerment from data collection to trading decisions
home.feature1Desc: Real-time monitoring of 300+ signal sources across 10 categories including price, volume, funding rates, on-chain data, and social media
home.feature2Desc: Multi-model collaborative analysis with GPT-4 / DeepSeek / Claude, generating structured market briefings and trading suggestions
home.feature3Desc: Multi-channel push via Telegram / Email / Webhook. Abnormal signals reach you in seconds, never miss any opportunity
home.feature4Desc: Scan results automatically drive AAGS grid strategy tuning, achieving AI + quantitative closed-loop automated trading

grid.subtitle: See how others profit, copy expert parameters with one click, AI-driven grid quantitative auto-trading

grid.clientDesc: Download and use, connect your Binance account, let AI-driven grid strategies trade automatically for you

grid.highlight2: AI scan results auto-drive strategy tuning
grid.highlight3: Share your strategy to the plaza with one click

grid.linuxDesc: No desktop required. Deploy with Docker in one command, access your grid trading terminal via browser

grid.linuxStep2Desc: Auto-pull image and start, auto-restart on crash
grid.linuxStep3Desc: Access your server IP + port to start trading
grid.linuxFeature2: Auto-restart — recovers from crashes and reboots
grid.linuxFeature3: Built-in proxy — exchange API CORS handled
grid.linuxFeature4: One-click update — docker pull to upgrade
